diff:
--- a/core/security.py
+++ b/core/security.py
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 import hashlib
 import secrets
+from typing import Optional
 
 def hash_password(password: str) -> str:
     salt = secrets.token_hex(16)
@@ -8,3 +9,15 @@
 def verify_password(password: str, hashed: str) -> bool:
     # Verify using constant-time comparison
     return secrets.compare_digest(password.encode(), hashed.encode())
+
+class TokenGenerator:
+    def __init__(self):
+        self.secret = os.getenv('TOKEN_SECRET', secrets.token_hex(32))
+
+    def generate(self, user_id: int) -> str:
+        payload = f'{user_id}.{time.time()}'.encode()
+        signature = hmac.new(self.secret.encode(), payload, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()
+        return f'{payload.decode()}.{signature}'
